description: Query NYC property records — deeds, mortgages, parties, and full BBL history — straight from NYC Open Data, with cross-dataset joins no raw ACRIS query can do.

novel_features.name: BBL document history
novel_features.description: Resolve a borough/block/lot to its full recorded-document history in one call.

novel_features.name: BBL debt & mortgage history
novel_features.description: List the mortgage and debt-instrument recordings for a BBL with amounts and dates.

novel_features.name: Party substring search
novel_features.description: Find recorded documents by partial party name (grantor, grantee, mortgagor, mortgagee).

novel_features.name: Full document view
novel_features.description: Assemble one document's master record, all its property (BBL) legals, and all its parties into a single object.

novel_features_built.name: BBL document history
novel_features_built.description: Resolve a borough/block/lot to its full recorded-document history in one call.
